title: River Watch Post Reference Pack

source.approximate_source: Placeholder chapter-level screenshot sequence for east-bank-road and river-watch-post. Replace with traced screenshots or curated video stills during reference capture. / chapter-09 的章节级截图序列占位，覆盖 east-bank-road 与 river-watch-post。后续 reference 采集时请替换为真实截图或视频关键帧。

notes: Bootstrap reference pack for chapter-09. It intentionally starts with low-confidence map, NPC, UI, and battle frames so the chapter can enter the reference pipeline without blocking gameplay lock. / chapter-09 的 bootstrap reference pack。它刻意从低置信度的地图、NPC、UI 和战斗关键帧起步，以便章节先进入 reference pipeline，而不阻塞 gameplay lock。

frames.notes: Replace with a real east-bank-road framing reference. / 后续请替换成真实的 east-bank-road 构图参考。
Replace with a real standing-frame reference for bank-sentry. / 后续请替换成 bank-sentry 的真实站立帧参考。
Replace with a real chapter-09 dialogue box frame. / 后续请替换成 chapter-09 的真实对话框参考。
Replace with a real battle still for the east-bank outlaw slice. / 后续请替换成 east-bank 乱兵战的真实战斗 still。
